reviews.quote: Best tri-tip sandwich in the valley, full stop. The family treats you like you've been coming for years — because you will be.
reviews.name: Placeholder

reviews.quote: Found my new neighborhood market. Incredible cuts, kind people, and they remembered my order the second time in. Rare these days.
reviews.name: Placeholder

reviews.quote: You can taste the care. This is what a butcher shop should feel like — old-school heart, modern everything else.
